data.title: Sachem Capital appoints interim CFO as permanent
data.description:
• Sachem Capital (NYSE:SACH) has appointed Jeffery C. Walraven as executive vice president and chief financial officer, effective September 1, 2025.
  • Walraven had been serving as interim CFO since December 2024.
  • Walraven has also resigned from the board, where he served since August 2024, following his permanent executive appointment.
  • Source: Press release

data.title: ServiceTitan pops as Q2 results, full-year guidance top estimates
data.description:
ServiceTitan (NASDAQ:TTAN) shares rose 12% in extended trading on Thursday after the trade-focused software firm reported fiscal second-quarter results and guidance that both topped Wall Street's forecast.

For the period ending July 31, ServiceTitan, which focused on software for HVAC firms, said it lost an adjusted $0.35 per share as revenue rose 25% year-over-year to come in at $242.1M. Analysts had expected the company to earn an adjusted $0.18 per share on $229.51M in revenue.

“I am grateful for the way our team empowered our customers to perform during the seasonally strongest quarter for the trades,” said Ara Mahdessian, Co-Founder and CEO. “The quality and breadth of execution underscore our opportunity to transform the lives of every hardworking contractor in the trades.”

Looking to the next quarter, ServiceTitan said it expects revenue to be between $237M and $239M (above $232.33M estimate), while adjusted income from operations is forecast to be between $14M and $15M. For the full-year, sales are forecast to be between $935M and $940M, while adjusted income from operations is expected to be between $74M and $76M. 

Analysts had expected the company to earn an adjusted $0.60 per share on $917.1M in revenue for the full year.

In conjunction with the results, ServiceTitan announced a partnership with RotoRooter.

The company will host a conference call at 5 p.m. EST to discuss the results.

(This story has been updated to include analyst estimates for the third-quarter.)

data.title: Marriott Vacations prices $575M of 6.500% senior notes
data.description:
• Marriott Vacations (NYSE:VAC) said on Thursday that its wholly owned subsidiary, Marriott Ownership Resorts, has priced an offering of $575M aggregate principal amount of 6.500% senior notes due 2033 in a private placement. 
  • The issuer intends to use the net proceeds from the notes, together with cash on hand, (i) for the payment of $575M aggregate principal amount of the 2026 convertible notes due at or prior to maturity on January 15, 2026, and (ii) to pay transaction expenses and fees in connection with the foregoing.

data.title: BILL Holdings gains after report of Starboard stake; may push for board changes
data.description:
BILL Holdings (NYSE:BILL) rose .6.5% in after-hours trading after a report that activist investor Starboard Value has a stake and may run a proxy fight for board seats at the financial automation software company.

Starboard, which has an 8% stake in BILL, has been building its position since the stock price fell recently, according to a  Reuters report on Thursday, which cited people familiar with the matter. The activist is expected to make a filing with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission as its holding exceeds the 5% threshold. 

Four of BILL's 12 directors will stand for election at this year's annual meeting, and Starboard may nominate as many as four before the Saturday deadline, according to the report. It wasn't known what other plans Starboard may have for BILL. 

Starboard couldn't be reached for comment by Reuters. BILL wasn't immediately available to comment. 

Shares of BILL have dropped 45% this year.

data.title: Brixmor prices $400M of 4.85% senior notes due 2033
data.description:
• Brixmor Operating Partnership, the operating arm of Brixmor Property Group (NYSE:BRX), has priced a $400M offering of 4.850% senior notes due 2033.
  • The notes were issued at 99.849% of par value, with interest payable semi-annually starting February 15, 2026.
  • The notes will mature on February 15, 2033.
  • Use of proceeds includes general corporate purposes, potentially including debt repayment.
  • The offering is expected to close on September 9, 2025.
  • Source: Press release

data.title: Costo posts another strong sales month in August
data.description:
Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ:COST) reported comparable sales for the retail month of August were up 6.3%, including a 6.1% increase in the U.S., a 6.8% rise in Canada, and a 6.7% gain for other international markets. E-commerce comparable sales shot up 18.3% during the quarter.

Costco (NASDAQ:COST) said comparable traffic was 4.1% higher during the month.

After stripping out the impact of foreign exchange and gas prices, comparable sales were up 6.9% during the month, including an increase of 6.7% in the U.S. The core sales increase was just off the 7.0% pace seen in August and higher than the 5.8% increase in July.

Total sales for the four-week period that ended on August 31 were up 8.7% to $19.83 billion to easily outpace the retail sector average. 

The retailer noted strong results for the fresh food category in August, which was up mid- to high single digits. The jewelry and garden categories were also strong during the month compared to a year ago.

Costco currently operates 914 warehouses, including 629 in the United States and Puerto Rico, 110 in Canada, 42 in Mexico, 37 in Japan, 29 in the United Kingdom, 20 in Korea, 15 in Australia, 14 in Taiwan, seven in China, five in Spain, two in France, two in Sweden, and one each in Iceland, and New Zealand. Costco also operates e-commerce sites in the U.S., Canada, the U.K., Mexico, Korea, Taiwan, Japan, and Australia.

Shares of Costco (COST) rose 0.1% in postmarket trading to $956.81 after rallying 0.6% during the regular session.

data.title: Guidewire Software Non-GAAP EPS of $0.84 beats by $0.21, revenue of $356.6M beats by $18.75M
data.description:
• Guidewire Software press release (NYSE:GWRE): FQ4 Non-GAAP EPS of $0.84 beats by $0.21.
  • Revenue of $356.6M (+22.3% Y/Y) beats by $18.75M.
  • Shares +3.62%.

  • Business Outlook

    Guidewire is issuing the following outlook for the first quarter of fiscal year 2026 based on current expectations:

    • Ending ARR between $1,048 million and $1,054 million
    • Total revenue between $315 million and $321 million
    • Operating income between $1 million and $7 million
    • Non-GAAP operating income between $47 million and $53 million

    Guidewire is issuing the following outlook for fiscal year 2026 based on current expectations:

    • Ending ARR between $1,210 million and $1,220 million
    • Total revenue between $1,385 million and $1,405 million
    • Operating income between $68 million and $88 million
    • Non-GAAP operating income between $259 million and $279 million
    • Operating cash flow between $350 million and $370 million
    • Q3 revenue consensus is $301.39M
    • FY revenue consensus is $1.35B

data.title: Quanex Building Products Non-GAAP EPS of $0.69 misses by $0.15, revenue of $495.27M beats by $3.62M
data.description:
• Quanex Building Products press release (NYSE:NX): Q3 Non-GAAP EPS of $0.69 misses by $0.15.
  • Revenue of $495.27M (+76.7% Y/Y) beats by $3.62M.
  • On a consolidated basis for fiscal 2025, the Company now estimates that it will generate net sales of approximately $1.82 billion, which Quanex expects will yield Adjusted EBITDA* of approximately $235 million.
  • Shares +1.82% AH.

data.title: Samsara Non-GAAP EPS of $0.12 beats by $0.05, revenue of $391.5M beats by $19.28M
data.description:

  • 2,771 customers with ARR over $100,000, an increase from 2,120 one year ago
